rulings.Case Title: LES JANKEY et al VS. SONG KOO LEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Stay Of Enforcement Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 25, 2010, line 1, PLAINTIFFS LES JANKEY, DISABILITY RIGHTS ENFORCEMENT, EDUCATION, SERVICES, HELPING YOU HELP OTHERS, Motion for Stay of Enforcement of Judgment. Is granted pursuant to CCP section 917.1(d). =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM ROUSE VS. CHEVRON CORP. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Sustaining Demurrer Andmotion To Strike Complaint;
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 25, 2010, line 2, PLAINTIFF WILLIAM ROUSE Motion for Reconsideration of Order Sustaining Demurrer and Motion to Strike Complaint. Off Calendar, as moot, per dismissal of entire action filed on June 9, 2010.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Reclassify Action To The Court Of Limited Jurisdiction
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 25, 2010, line 3, DEFENDANT SANDI YOUNG, Motion to Reclassify Action to the Court of Limited Jurisdiction. Is denied. Insufficient showing that the action will necessarily result in a verdict less than $25,000. Walker vs. Superior Court (1991) 53 Cal.3d 257. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD BOWLING JR. VS. ADVERTISING DISPLAY SYSTEMS I, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 25, 2010, line 4, PLAINTIFF RICHARD BOWLING, Motion to Enforce Settlement Agreement. Is continued to 7/14/2010 per ex parte order signed 6/21/2010. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Change Of Venue
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 25, 2010, line 10, DEFENDANT IRWIN FRIEDMAN Motion for Change of Venue. Is denied. The last act necessary to create the contract was performed on August 27, 2008 in San Francisco when it was signed by Griffith. CCP section 395(a). Mitchell vs. Superior Court (1986) 186 Cal.App. 3d 1040.=(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDER TREPETIN VS. TIMOTHY MEEHAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 25, 2010, line 11, DEFENDANT TIMOTHY MEEHAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Is overruled, five days leave to answer. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. GENOVEVA CAMPOS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority'S Motion For Summary Judgment (Continued From Jun-23-2010)
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 25, 2010, line 12, Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority's Motion for Summary Judgment (Continued From Jun-23-2010). Hearing required. A triable issue of fact appears to be raised whether plaintiff is proceeding on the operative lease. =(302/CWW)
